case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. JOHN J DIMEO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DIMEO, JOHN J AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-17-2009

DECLARATION FOR PERMITTING THE USE OF COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS IN OBTAINING DEFAULT & DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $418.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DIMEO, JOHN J AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION IN LIU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT [CCP 585(D)] FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIMEO, JOHN J AN INDIVIDUAL $23,719.11 PRINCIPAL, $418.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,137.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
